contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT] - Type: Time (Minutes) - Amount: 30 - Description: Replace hardcoded version with live Git commit hash on EDGAR DAO Protocol landing page Pull requests (GitHub evidence): - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/113 Details: Changes made to dao_protocol: 1. **`truesight_dao_client/__init__.py`** — `__version__` now dynamically reads `git rev-parse --short HEAD` at import time (falls back to "dev" if not in a git repo) 2. **`truesight_dao_client/server/static/index.html`** — Removed hardcoded "1.0.0", replaced with `
—
` that JS fetches from `/ping` and renders as a clickable link to `https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/commit/` 3. **`truesight_dao_client/server/routes/dao.py`** — Added `PARTNER ADD EVENT` card to the landing page Governance section (incidental improvement from the PR) Now visiting https://edgar.truesight.me shows the live commit hash (e.g. "6c7ab60") as a clickable link to the exact commit on GitHub. The `/ping` endpoint also returns the hash as its version. - Contributor(s): Gary Teh - TDG Issued: 0 - Attached Filename: N/A - Destination Contribution File Location: N/A -------- My Digital Signature:  Request Transaction ID:  This submission was generated using https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot Verify submission here: https://dapp.truesight.me/verify_request.html
rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
